entry.title: Entry #272 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655

entry.title: Entry #262 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT against Defendants All Defendants amending Amended Complaint/Petition 218, Amended Complaint/Petition 118, Amended Complaint/Petition, 254, Complaint (Attorney Civil Case Opening), 1, filed by Plaintiffs R. M., N. Z., B. L., S. M., A. L.(Carey, Robert) (Entered: 07/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #261 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: ORDER RE JOINT STIPULATION REGARDING FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT AND SETTING BRIEFING SCHEDULE FOR MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND by Judge Fred W. Slaughter 260 . NOTE: CHANGES MADE BY COURT. Plaintiffs shall file a Fourth Amended Complaint on or before July 2, 2026; Plaintiffs shall file their Motion for Leave to Amend (Motion) on or before July 21, 2026; ( Responses due by 9/1/2026, Replies due by 9/29/2026.) The in-person hearing on the Motion will be set for October 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. in Courtroom 10D. (twdb) (Entered: 07/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #260 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: STIPULATION to Amend Sealed Document, 259 filed by Specially Appearing Defendants Fenix International Limited, Fenix Internet LLC. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order)(Russell, Jason) (Entered: 06/30/2026)

entry.title: Entry #259 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: SEALED DOCUMENT Third Amended Class Action Complaint re APPLICATION to file document Third Amended Class Action Complaint under seal 252, Amended Complaint/Petition, 254, Order on Motion for Leave to File Document Under Seal, 257 filed by Plaintiffs J. A., A. L., B. L., R. M., S. M., N. T., N. Z.. (Attachments: # 1 Proof of Service)(Carey, Robert) (Entered: 06/17/2026)

entry.title: Entry #258 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: ORDER RE JOINT STIPULATION EXTENDING TIME TO RESPOND TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT AND SETTING BRIEFING SCHEDULE by Judge Fred W. Slaughter 256 . NOTE: CHANGES MADE BY COURT. Defendants shall file any motions responding to the Third Amended Complaint on or before July 21, 2026; SEE DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER INFORMATION. (twdb) (Entered: 06/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #257 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: ORDER RE PLAINTIFFS' APPLICATION TO FILE UNDER SEAL THIRD AMENDED CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT by Judge Fred W. Slaughter 252 . NOTE: CHANGES MADE BY COURT. Plaintiffs shall file the unredacted Third Amended Class Action Complaint, (Dkt. 253-1), as a new and separate filing on or before June 18, 2026, under seal pursuant to Central District of California Local Civil Rule 79-5.2.2(c). (twdb) (Entered: 06/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #256 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: Joint STIPULATION for Extension of Time to File Response to Third Amended Complaint and Setting Briefing Schedule filed by Specially Appearing Defendants Fenix International Limited, Fenix Internet LLC. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order)(Russell, Jason) (Entered: 06/15/2026)

entry.title: Entry #252 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: APPLICATION to file document Third Amended Class Action Complaint under seal filed by Plaintiffs A. L., B. L., R. M., S. M., N. Z.. (Attachments: # 1 Redacted Document Third Amended Class Action Complaint, # 2 Proposed Order, # 3 Proof of Service)(Carey, Robert) (Entered: 06/09/2026)

entry.title: Entry #251 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: MINUTES (IN CHAMBERS) by Judge Fred W. Slaughter: ORDER GRANTING IN PART AND DENYING IN PART DEFENDANTS' MOTIONS TO DISMISS PLAINTIFFS' SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT 225, 227, 228, 229, 230, 231, 232 . If Plaintiffs believe they can cure the deficiencies described in this Order, Plaintiffs shall file any amended complaint on or before June 9, 2026. If Plaintiffs do not file an amended complaint, Agency Defendants shall file an answer to the claims and allegations remaining in the SAC on or before June 23, 2026, and the court will dismiss Fenix Defendants from this case. SEE DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER INFORMATION. (twdb) (Entered: 05/21/2026)

entry.title: Entry #250 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-04-06 in N.Z. v. Fenix International Limited, 8:24-cv-01655
entry.summary: Dismiss AND Dismiss AND Dismiss AND Dismiss AND Dismiss AND Dismiss Party
